meaning: adj.[生](自主神经纤维)释出组胺的 被组胺激活的
examples: The H 3 receptors are presynaptic receptors which regulate the synthesis and release of histamine in histaminergic neurons in central nervous system.
CONCLUSION: histamine H1-receptors plays a certain role in spatial cognition, and its action may be due to both histaminergic and cholinergic neurons.
Histaminergic drugs have long been used to treat balance disorders in man, but their mechanisms of action in the vestibular system are poorly understood.
